overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring an NCPD officer patrolling a rain-soaked, neon-lit Night City street at night. The character walks along wet sidewalks, stops to check traffic at a crosswalk, and crosses the street while holding a submachine gun in a tactical stance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with automated vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green-tiled sidewalk next to a brightly lit vending machine complex, holding a submachine gun at the ready in a tactical patrol stance

entered.detail: large curved structure with multiple illuminated vending machine displays showing colorful advertisements
wide staircase leading up to an elevated walkway or building entrance
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk with green tiled flooring, passing a large illuminated vending machine complex on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights as the character approaches a crosswalk.

events.description: character stops walking and turns to survey the intersection for traffic
character looks left and right while waiting at the crosswalk edge

agents.ego_description: stopped at the crosswalk edge, looking left and right to check for vehicles while maintaining a tactical stance with weapon ready

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the edge of the crosswalk, looking left and right to check for traffic. The vending machine complex falls behind as the character waits at the intersection under the traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk with yellow striped markings

events.description: character begins crossing the street, turning to face the crosswalk direction
character turns around while crossing to face the original travel direction

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk, turning to face forward while maintaining weapon readiness and tactical awareness

entered.detail: green metal railings along the opposite sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wet street, turning to face the direction of travel. The green metal railings of the opposite sidewalk come into view as the character moves across the yellow-striped crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with metal railings and urban debris

events.description: passing by a trash can and scattered litter on the sidewalk
camera briefly passes behind a street pole

agents.ego_description: continuing to patrol along the opposite sidewalk, passing trash receptacles and green metal railings while heading down the neon-lit street

entered.detail: cylindrical public trash receptacle with garbage visible inside
bright pink neon sign displaying 24h and other advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the opposite sidewalk, passing a trash can and green metal railings. The neon-lit street stretches ahead with various storefronts and advertisements visible in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an officer patrols a rain-soaked urban corridor, transitioning from a sheltered sidewalk across a neon-lit intersection. It begins with the character walking along a covered path with green tiled flooring, passing a large illuminated vending machine complex that reflects brightly on the wet pavement. As the character reaches the edge of the crosswalk, the camera slows to a halt while the officer checks for traffic under the glow of the streetlights. The scene then shifts as the character steps onto the yellow-striped crossing, moving across the shimmering asphalt toward the green metal railings of the opposite side. Finally, the camera follows the officer back onto the sidewalk, passing a trash can and moving deeper into the rainy night where storefronts and advertisements stretch into the distance.
